howItWorks.step2Description: Claude AI understands sentiment, identifies key themes, and flags urgent reviews that need attention.
howItWorks.step3Description: Get AI-drafted responses in your brand voice. Edit if needed, then publish directly to Google.

features.heading: Everything You Need to Master Your Reviews
features.description: One platform to monitor, analyze, and respond to every Google review with AI precision.
features.smartAiResponsesDesc: Powered by Claude AI, responses match your brand voice — professional, friendly, or whatever tone you set.
features.sentimentAnalysisDesc: Every review scored for sentiment with key themes extracted. Know what customers love and what needs fixing.
features.instantNotificationsDesc: Get alerted the moment a new review comes in. Negative reviews trigger urgent alerts so you respond fast.
features.brandVoiceControlDesc: Set your tone, preferred phrases, and response style. Every AI response sounds unmistakably you.
features.saveTimeDesc: Businesses with 50+ monthly reviews save an average of 10 hours per week. That's time back for what matters.
features.multiLocationDesc: Manage reviews across all your locations from one dashboard. Set different brand voices per location.

interactiveDemo.heading: Watch AI Craft the Perfect Response
interactiveDemo.description: Select a review type below and see how RevUp.ai responds.
interactiveDemo.review5Star: Absolutely wonderful experience! The staff went above and beyond to make our anniversary dinner special. The food was incredible, and the ambiance was perfect. Will definitely be coming back!
interactiveDemo.response5Star: Thank you so much, Sarah! We're thrilled that we could make your anniversary celebration special. Our team takes great pride in creating memorable dining experiences, and your kind words mean the world to us. We look forward to welcoming you back soon — perhaps we can make your next visit equally unforgettable!
interactiveDemo.review3Star: Food was decent but the wait was too long for a Tuesday night. Server was friendly but seemed overwhelmed. Might give it another shot but they need to work on timing.
interactiveDemo.response3Star: Hi James, thank you for your honest feedback. You're right — wait times on that evening didn't meet our standards, and we're addressing this with additional staffing during peak hours. We'd love the chance to show you the experience we're known for. If you visit again, please ask for a manager — we'll make sure your next visit is seamless.
interactiveDemo.review1Star: Terrible service. Waited 45 minutes for appetizers, food was cold when it arrived, and the manager was dismissive when we complained. Won't be returning.
interactiveDemo.response1Star: David, I sincerely apologize for this experience — it falls far below what we strive for. Cold food and long waits are unacceptable, and a dismissive response makes it worse. I'd like to make this right personally. Could you email me at manager@restaurant.com? I want to understand what happened and ensure it doesn't happen again.

testimonials.heading: Don't Take Our Word for It
testimonials.quote1: RevUp.ai cut our review response time from 2 days to 2 hours. The AI responses are so good, customers think a real person wrote them.
testimonials.quote2: Managing reviews across 12 locations was a nightmare. Now it's a 15-minute daily check. The sentiment analysis helps us spot issues before they become patterns.
testimonials.quote3: We went from a 3.6 to a 4.4 star average in 3 months. Turns out, just responding to every review makes a massive difference — and RevUp.ai makes it effortless.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about RevUp.ai.
faq.q1: How does RevUp.ai generate review responses?
faq.a1: RevUp.ai uses Claude AI by Anthropic — one of the world's most capable AI models — to analyze each review's content, sentiment, and context. It then generates a response that matches your configured brand voice, tone, and style preferences. Every response is drafted, never auto-published — you always have final approval.
faq.q2: Is it safe to connect my Google Business Profile?
faq.a2: Absolutely. We use Google's official OAuth 2.0 authentication — the same secure method used by Google's own apps. RevUp.ai only accesses your review data and the ability to post replies. We never access your email, contacts, or any other Google data. You can revoke access at any time from your Google Account settings.
faq.q3: Can I edit AI-generated responses before publishing?
faq.a3: Yes, always. Every AI response starts as a draft. You can edit it, regenerate it with different instructions, or write your own response from scratch. Nothing is ever published to Google without your explicit approval.
faq.q4: What happens if I go over my monthly response limit?
faq.a4: You'll receive a notification when you're approaching your limit. Once reached, you can still view and manage reviews, but new AI responses will be paused until your next billing cycle — or you can upgrade your plan instantly for immediate access to more responses.
faq.q5: Do you support multiple Google Business locations?
faq.a5: Yes! The Pro plan supports up to 10 locations, and Enterprise offers unlimited locations. Each location can have its own brand voice settings, notification preferences, and team permissions. You manage everything from one unified dashboard.
faq.q6: How quickly does RevUp.ai detect new reviews?
faq.a6: New reviews are detected within minutes using Google's real-time notification system. You'll receive an alert immediately, and an AI-drafted response will be ready for your approval by the time you open the dashboard.
faq.q7: Can I customize the AI's writing style?
faq.a7: Extensively. You control the tone (professional, casual, warm, etc.), formality level, whether to use emoji, preferred phrases, phrases to avoid, response length, and even provide example responses for the AI to learn from. The more you customize, the more the AI sounds like you.
faq.a8: Yes — every plan includes a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime during the trial at no cost.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Review Management?
finalCta.subtitle: Join 500+ businesses that save 10+ hours every week with AI-powered review responses.

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Find answers and get help with ReviewAI
help.step1Desc: Link your Google Business Profile to start syncing reviews automatically.
help.step2Desc: Customize how the AI responds to match your brand's personality and tone.
help.step3Desc: Check AI-generated responses, edit if needed, and approve them for publishing.
help.step4Desc: Add team members to collaborate on review management and response approval.
help.helpQ1: How do I get started with ReviewAI?
help.helpA1: Start by connecting your Google Business Profile from the Settings page. Once connected, ReviewAI will automatically sync your reviews and begin generating AI-powered responses for you to review and publish.
help.helpQ2: How do I connect my Google Business Profile?
help.helpA2: Go to Settings > General and click "Connect Google Account." You'll be redirected to Google to authorize ReviewAI to access your Business Profile. After authorization, select the locations you want to manage.
help.helpA3: When a new review comes in, ReviewAI analyzes the content, sentiment, and context to generate a personalized response based on your Brand Voice settings. Responses go through your approval workflow before being published -- you always have the final say.
help.helpQ4: Can I customize the AI's tone and style?
help.helpA4: Yes! Go to Settings > Brand Voice to configure the tone, formality, humor level, preferred phrases, phrases to avoid, and more. The AI will follow these guidelines when generating responses.
help.helpQ5: What happens when I get a negative review?
help.helpA5: ReviewAI flags negative reviews (1-2 stars) as urgent and can send you immediate alerts via email or in-app notifications. The AI generates extra-careful responses for negative reviews, focusing on empathy and resolution.
help.helpQ6: How does the approval workflow work?
help.helpA6: AI-generated responses start as drafts. You can review, edit, approve, or reject them. Only approved responses get published to Google. You can configure automatic publishing for responses above a certain confidence threshold in your plan settings.
help.helpQ7: Can multiple team members manage reviews?
help.helpA7: Yes! Go to Settings > Team to invite team members. You can assign roles (Owner, Admin, Member) with different permission levels. Admins can approve and publish responses, while Members can view and draft responses.
help.helpA8: Yes. ReviewAI uses industry-standard encryption, and your Google credentials are stored securely. We never share your data with third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
help.contactSupportDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
help.responseTime: Typical response time: under 24 hours during business days
